title: Everybody Loves: Bees
description: Because everybody loves, and everybody loves bees!
body:
![A series of Minecraft bees carrying pride flags while looking to the right.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/VoPLAAlB/images/3477b4b032a9a331c51c70a91557816b107888d4.png)

# Everybody Loves: Bees
This Pride Month, we wanted to contribute to the growing pool of pride-themed packs, but we wanted to put our own spin on things.  
Sure, changing bee stripes is a natural way to incorporate pride into these flying insects' designs, but we wanted something that could easily translate into being used with other resource packs as well.  So instead, your buzzing besties are carrying around various flags determined by entity name!

## Everybody Loves  
If you're missing out colorful homes for your flag-carrying bees, check out the companion project [Everybody Loves: Hives](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/everybody-loves-hives), and keep your eye on the [Everybody Loves collection](https://modrinth.com/collection/zi1cybwo)!

## How it works
Thanks to the power of [EMF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features), we're able to add on to the Bee's model in a way that won't affect normal gameplay, vanilla users, or other resource packs!   

This pack is easy to modify, add on to, or integrate with other resource packs, like we've done with Modern Mizuno's.  
You're more than welcome to make an addon or integrate this with your own resource pack, just be sure to provide credit in your project's Description.

<center>

![A series of pride flag carrying bees from the resource packs Ashen, Bare Bones, and Modern Mizuno's](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/VoPLAAlB/images/054dad217d60adf2d542da00f5dff8690652cc86.png)  
*Pride flag carrying bees from [Ashen](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/ashen), [Bare Bones](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bare-bones), and [Modern Mizuno's](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/modern-mizunos)*

</center>



To add a flag to a bee, simply rename it with a name including one of these phrases:

<details>
<summary>Names</summary>

- ace
- agender
- aro
- bisexual
- demi
- gay
- genderfluid
- genderqueer
- intersex
- lesbian
- nonbinary
- pan
- poly
- pride
- progress
- trans

</details>



## Support your community
Minecraft is **everybody's game**, and this community has been a meaningful and accepting place for us and many others. If you love our content or any of the other amazing creations this scene has produced, then know that it would not be here if it were not for those who work hard to make it an accepting and loving place.  

If you're reading this while it's still the month of June 2025 and are looking for a way to help make a difference, we encourage you to join us and the broader Minecraft community by supporting The Trevor Project, optionally through the Modrinth fundraiser at https://modrinth.com/pride.
